name: RapidMiner Data Science Platform REST API
what_it_does: RapidMiner (now Altair RapidMiner) data science platform REST API for data scientists and business analysts to automate ML model training, deployment, and prediction serving — enabling AI agents to manage automated machine learning pipelines, deploy predictive models as REST endpoints, monitor model performance, and integrate predictions into business applications through Altair RapidMiner's visual data science platform. Enables AI agents to manage process execution for RapidMiner process (workflow) trigger and result retrieval automation, handle model serving for deployed predictive model real-time scoring API automation, access AutoML for automated machine learning pipeline creation and evaluation automation, retrieve dataset management for training data upload and feature engineering automation, manage deployment management for model version deployment and endpoint management automation, handle scoring for batch and real-time model prediction request automation, access monitoring for model drift and performance degradation detection automation, retrieve collaboration for team workspace and project sharing automation, manage integration for ERP and CRM data connection and prediction embedding automation, and integrate RapidMiner with cloud platforms and business applications for MLOps automation.
use_cases: Deploying AutoML-trained predictive models as scoring APIs for business prediction automation agents
Orchestrating ML pipeline execution for model retraining and refresh for MLOps automation agents
Submitting batch scoring requests for large-scale prediction generation for analytics automation agents
Monitoring deployed model performance and drift for model governance automation agents
not_for: Deep learning and neural network training at GPU scale (RapidMiner is optimized for tabular ML, not deep learning infrastructure)
Open-source-only MLOps without commercial platform (RapidMiner requires commercial license; MLflow and Kubeflow serve open-source MLOps)
Real-time streaming ML inference at sub-millisecond latency (RapidMiner is batch and near-real-time; specialized inference servers are faster)
best_when: A business analytics or data science team wanting AI agents to automate ML model deployment, AutoML pipeline execution, and model scoring through Altair RapidMiner's visual data science platform integrated with enterprise business applications.
avoid_when: ALTAIR ACQUISITION CHANGED ROADMAP: RapidMiner was acquired by Altair in 2023; automated independent-roadmap assumption creates strategic_uncertainty for long-term platform planning; automated should evaluate Altair's unified AI platform strategy. COMMERCIAL LICENSE IS REQUIRED: RapidMiner requires commercial Altair license; automated open-source assumption creates license_required for production use beyond trial; automated must have Altair RapidMiner license. PROCESS EXECUTION IS ASYNCHRONOUS: RapidMiner process (ML pipeline) execution is asynchronous; automated sync-result assumption creates incomplete_result for result retrieval before process completes; automated must poll process job status until completion. MODEL DEPLOYMENT REQUIRES CONFIGURATION: Deploying models as REST scoring endpoints requires explicit deployment step; automated auto-deploy assumption creates endpoint_not_found for model scoring attempts against non-deployed models; automated must deploy models before scoring.

auth.notes: RapidMiner uses API key and OAuth2 for Platform REST API. REST API with JSON. Ann Arbor, MI HQ (acquired by Altair 2023). Founded 2001 by Ingo Mierswa and Ralf Klinkenberg at TU Dortmund. Products: RapidMiner Studio (visual ML), RapidMiner Go (AutoML), RapidMiner Deployment (MLOps). Used by 40,000+ data science teams. Industries: financial services, manufacturing, retail, healthcare. Altair: Troy, MI. Competes with Dataiku, KNIME, and Alteryx for visual data science platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: RapidMiner Studio: free community edition with limited rows; Go: trial available
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; Altair Units consumption model; enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Ann Arbor MI. Altair acquisition 2023. Community free edition. Altair Units consumption pricing. 40,000+ users.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; scoring APIs throttled per deployment configuration

known_agent_gotchas: PROCESS EXECUTION REQUIRES DEPLOYED PROCESS: Triggering RapidMiner processes via API requires processes deployed to RapidMiner Server; automated local-process assumption creates process_not_found for API execution of processes not deployed to server; automated must deploy processes before API execution

SCORING ENDPOINT REQUIRES MODEL DEPLOYMENT: Model scoring requires explicit model deployment to create REST endpoint; automated train-then-score assumption creates no_endpoint for scoring models not yet deployed as REST services; automated must complete deployment step before scoring

CONTEXT PARAMETERS PASS MACRO VALUES: RapidMiner process parameters are passed as macros; automated direct-variable assumption creates parameter_not_applied for values not correctly passed as macro substitutions in process execution request; automated must use correct macro parameter format

ALTAIR PLATFORM UNIFICATION IN PROGRESS: Post-acquisition, Altair is unifying RapidMiner into Altair One platform; automated stable-API assumption creates migration_risk for integrations built against pre-acquisition API endpoints; automated should monitor Altair migration announcements

BATCH SCORING HAS SIZE LIMITS: Batch scoring requests have data size limits per deployment configuration; automated unlimited-batch assumption creates request_too_large for scoring batches exceeding size limits; automated must implement chunked batch scoring for large datasets
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data science platform. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. ML models and training data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Data science platform. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. ML model and analytical data.
